people.description: Create people (staff/managers) to operate the restaurant.
people.noRestaurant: Select or create a restaurant to manage people.
people.emptyState: No people yet. Use the form above to add.

error.codeGenFailed: Could not generate a unique code. Try again.

publicPage.title: Public page
publicPage.description: These fields appear on the restaurant's public page.
publicPage.saved: Saved. The public page will be updated.
publicPage.notConfigured: Complete the restaurant setup to edit.

perception.title: Operational Perception
perception.subtitle: Connect an IP camera to ChefIApp to monitor operations in real time.
perception.instruction: Paste the camera link (RTSP, iCSee or HTTP stream) and choose the zone. ChefIApp displays the image and, in future versions, detects patterns automatically.
perception.cameraZoneDesc: Associate this camera with a restaurant zone.
perception.icseeTooltip: iCSee: copy the share link from the iCSee app and paste it here.
perception.cameraCheckDesc: Use "Watch live" to confirm the camera is active.
perception.icseeShareDesc: If you use iCSee, copy the share link from the app and paste it in the field above.
perception.icseeHint: Tip: in the iCSee app, go to Share → Copy link.
perception.streamError: Error loading the stream. Check the link.
perception.streamHint: If the image does not load, confirm that the camera is on and the link is valid.
perception.observationDesc: Coming soon: pattern detection by zone.
perception.analyzeDesc: Send a capture for analysis with artificial intelligence.

locations.emptyState: No locations yet. Use the button below to add the first one.

reservas.title: Reservations
reservas.subtitle: Availability, guarantee, slots, messages and reminders.
reservas.sectionResumenDesc: Central reservations configuration. Use the tabs for Availability, Guarantee, Slots and Messages.
reservas.sectionDisponibilidadDesc: Hours and capacity by day and location. Phase 2: calendar and limits.
reservas.sectionGarantiaDesc: Deposits, no-show charges, cancellation policies. Phase 2.
reservas.sectionTurnosDesc: Slot duration and time blocks. Phase 2.
reservas.sectionMensajesDesc: Email and SMS templates for confirmation and reminders. Phase 2.

legalEntities.cardDesc: Which legal entity is used per location. Covers franchises, multi-company and groups.
legalEntities.emptyLocations: No locations yet. Create locations in Settings → Locations.
legalEntities.warningNoEntity: Define the main legal entity in the first card so it is associated with locations.

devices.pairingTpvRedirectDesc: To link a TPV, use the dedicated page: download installer, generate code and open the TPV app in one flow.
devices.pairingKdsDesc: Generate a code and enter it in the desktop app to link this device as TPV or KDS.
devices.pairingCodeHint: Enter this code in the ChefIApp desktop app when you launch it for the first time.
devices.appstaffSubtitle: Provisioning and list of AppStaff devices.
devices.addAppstaffDesc: Generate a QR code to link a phone or tablet as AppStaff to this restaurant.
devices.registeredDesc: AppStaff devices linked to this restaurant. The dot indicates last activity.
devices.emptyAppstaff: No AppStaff registered yet. Use the QR above to link the first one.
devices.tpvPageSubtitle: Download, install, link and view your till terminals.
devices.tpvSection1Lead: Download the package for your system (macOS or Windows).
devices.tpvSection2Line2: On macOS, if the system blocks it: System Preferences → Privacy & Security → allow opening. On first prompt you can use "Open Anyway".
devices.tpvSection2Line3: Then return here to link the terminal.
devices.tpvSection3Intro: This step creates the TPV identity at this restaurant.
devices.tpvSection3Instruction: Open the TPV app, paste the code and confirm the link.
devices.openAppTpvTitle: Opens the TPV app if already installed
devices.pasteHint: Paste in the TPV app in the code field and confirm linking.
devices.devHint: Dev: if "Open TPV app" does not open, run in terminal
devices.tpvSection4Desc: Terminals linked to this restaurant. Status and last activity updated by the app.
devices.emptyTpv: No TPV yet. Generate a code above and use it in the TPV app to link the first one.
devices.downloadInstallerIncludesKds: The TPV installer also includes KDS (TPV ecosystem).
devices.downloadPackagePreparing: Package in preparation. Download buttons will be active when the release is published.
devices.downloadDevDesc: In development there is no published release. Generate the installer locally and install to /Applications.
devices.downloadBuildStep1: cd desktop-app && pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm dist:mac
devices.downloadBuildStep4: Open once via Finder (registers the chefiapp-pos:// handler)
devices.downloadFooterNote: The TPV installer also includes KDS (KDS comes from TPV).

qr.iosStep1: Open the Camera app on iPhone
qr.iosStep4: If asked which browser, select Safari
qr.iosNote: If it opens in another browser by mistake, go back and repeat selecting Safari.

printer.noStationForOverride: No workstation defined for override. Set up a station.
printer.requiresDesktopDesc: Printer setup requires the ChefIApp desktop app installed and linked.
printer.notReadyDesc: An active restaurant is required to configure printers.
printer.title: Printers
printer.description: Associate printers with the restaurant's printing functions.
printer.noPrintersFound: No printers found. Check if the desktop agent is running.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect POS, delivery, social media and other services to your restaurant.

payments.label: Payments
payments.description: Connect payment methods to the POS and web.

googleBusiness.label: Google Business
googleBusiness.description: Manage your presence on Google Maps and Google Business.

instagram.label: Instagram
instagram.description: Automatically publish photos and stories from the restaurant.

softwareTpv.title: TPV Software
softwareTpv.subtitle: General configuration and quick mode for the point of sale.
softwareTpv.configCardDesc: TPV preferences: language, currency, closing behaviour.
softwareTpv.confirmOnCloseLabel: Ask for confirmation when closing shift
softwareTpv.quickModeDesc: Shortcuts and fast flow for peak service (bar, terrace).
softwareTpv.errorCoreUnavailable: Core unavailable or restaurant not selected.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Send digital receipts and notifications to customers via email.
